title: GuardianOptimized
description: A basic optimization integration based on Neoforge.
body:
### Introduction
GuardianOptimized is a high-version optimized modpack implemented on the Neoforge platform. This modpack enhances vanilla rendering and other aspects to significantly improve frame rates while preserving core gameplay mechanics. Users can freely integrate additional mods into the pack to extend optimization benefits to third-party content.
### Features
- Rendering Overhaul: Utilizes Neoforge-adapted mods like Sodium-Neo to refine the vanilla video settings interface and rendering pipeline, with Iris shader support for seamless lighting/shader integration.
- Functional Alternatives: Implements MaFgLib-powered solutions such as the Tweakerge mod and the Forgematica mod to bridge compatibility gaps between Fabric and Neoforge ecosystems.
### 简介
GuardianOptimized是一个基于Neoforge端实现的高版本优化整合。该整合包对原版的渲染和其他方面做了一些优化，使得帧速大大提高。
该整合包保留了原版特性，您可以自行将其他mod加入整合包中，以在游玩其他mod时得到更好的优化。
### 特性
- 基于Neoforge端的钠等mod对原版视频设置界面和渲染进行了调整。并且支持iris以加载光影。
- 由于Neoforge端不存在tweakeroo等等Fabric端存在的mod，该整合包使用了MaFgLib支持的Tweakerge模组与全息蓝图模组，来实现tweakeroo与投影等等的平替。
